title: PG Vector credentials not set for chatbot
symptom: The chatbot stops responding and throws an error related to PG Vector credentials being empty.
not_this_if: Chatbot works in manual execution mode
root_cause: The PG Vector Store node requires valid credentials to connect to the Postgres database. If these credentials are empty or not properly configured, the chatbot will fail to function as expected.
fix_steps: Confirm Execution Logic is set to v1
Reconnect the Postgres credentials on the PGVector Store node
Hit Publish and test via the production chat URL
agent_instruction: Reconnect the Postgres credentials and publish the workflow to test the chatbot.
